name: Women's Shiny Plastic Square Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses - Universal Thread™ Tortoise Brown: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Showcase your glam looks while heading out by accessorizing with the Shiny Plastic Square Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses from Universal Thread™. These square sunglasses feature a tortoise shell-print brown frame with gradient lenses for a fashionable look. The lenses have a UV protection feature to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. Made of a 100% recycled plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these tortoise shell-print sunglasses fit medium faces.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
